allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'assistant': msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) content = msg.get\('content', []\) for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('ASSISTANT TEXT:', c['text'][:500]\) elif isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'tool_use': print\('TOOL USE:', c.get\('name'\), '-', json.dumps\(c.get\('input', {}\)\)[:300]\) elif obj.get\('type'\) == 'human': msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) content = msg.get\('content', []\) for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('USER TEXT:', c['text'][:300]\) except: pass ")
